remember: Students will be able to recall and recognize the title, poet's name, and publication details of 'Poets and Pancakes'.
Students will be able to identify and define the key terms related to the poem.
understand: Students will be able to comprehend the theme, tone, and message of the poem 'Poets and Pancakes'.
Students will be able to explain the poet's use of language and literary devices in the poem.
apply: Students will be able to apply their understanding of the poem to identify and analyze the poet's intentions and emotions.
Students will be able to use textual evidence to support their analysis of the poem.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the poet's use of imagery, symbolism, and other literary devices to convey the theme and message of the poem.
Students will be able to evaluate the poet's use of language and form to create a specific tone and effect.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to understand the poet's use of language and literary devices to convey the theme and message of the poem.
Students will be able to analyze the poet's intentions and emotions through the poem.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to identify and explain the theme and tone of the poem 'Poets and Pancakes' in the CBSE board exam.
Students will be able to analyze the poet's use of language and literary devices in the poem and evaluate its impact on the reader.
